text: FIRST INFORMATION REPORT. P.S. Saket, New Delhi. FIR No. 00412/2026, u/s 380 IPC (theft). Complainant: Mr. Anil Kumar Sharma, age 41, R/o H.No. 27, Lane 4, Malviya Nagar, New Delhi-110017, mobile 9876543210, Aadhaar 5421 8830 1290. On 14-03-2026 at about 22:30 hrs the complainant reported that his motorcycle (DL 3S AB 4521) was stolen from outside his residence. Accused named: one Rakesh @ Raju, R/o Khirki Extension. Investigating Officer: SI Pooja Verma.

STATEMENT u/s 161 CrPC. Witness: Mrs. Sunita Devi, w/o Ramesh, R/o H.No. 31 Malviya Nagar, mobile 9811234567. The witness stated she saw two men near the vehicle at around 22:15 hrs and can identify them. She has requested that her identity be kept confidential as the accused live in the same locality and she fears for her safety. Statement recorded by SI Pooja Verma.

INVESTIGATION STATUS as on 20-03-2026: Investigation is ONGOING. Accused Rakesh @ Raju has not yet been apprehended; a raid is planned. CCTV footage from a neighbouring shop is under technical examination and the recovery of the vehicle is pending. Disclosure of investigative steps at this stage may alert the accused. IO: SI Pooja Verma, contact 9810098100.
